summary: Adjusted the opening scaffold so chapter 16 enters through the ferry plank and alley instead of a time-led setup that echoed chapter 17, and tightened the closing sentence to point more cleanly into the next chapter's short night at Ferrymouth.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to shift the entry point from a morning summary to the ferry plank and Silas's labor.
Revised the final sentence to emphasize the brief night before chapter 17 without changing the chapter's outcome.
